title: SUCCESS: 2026-06-22: Verified active Screen Sharing connection quality on laptop. Used AppleScript to query the menu bar and...
content: Approach: 2026-06-22: Verified active Screen Sharing connection quality on laptop. Used AppleScript to query the menu bar and confirmed that 'Adaptive Quality' is already selected (checked ✓) and window scaling is active, representing the lowest/most optimal bandwidth usage available.
